headline_seed: Senate Republicans narrowly block bid to bar Trump’s $1.8bn fund to pay allies - The Guardian
draft_text:
Senate Republicans defeated Chuck Schumer's bid to permanently kill Trump's $1.8B anti-weaponization fund, 50-49. Three GOP senators — Collins, Husted, and Sullivan — crossed party lines. CNN and NBC News report all three face 2026 re-election fights.

And that's the mews.
